sections.paragraph:
ἄφεσις, εως, ἡ [ἀφίημι; ‘letting go’, freq. of cancelled penal liabilities or indebtedness]

—1. release of prisoners Lk 4:18a, of the downtrodden vs. 18b.

—2. in imagistic extension of release from confinement and cancellation of liabilities: forgiveness (of), release (from) with the gen. ἁμαρτιῶν Mt 26:28 and often; cp. Eph 1:7; Hb 9:22; 10:18.
